node.statement: QED: The error-correction transition occurs when the two configurations become degenerate. For B-purity: g_{s,e}+1 = g_{s,s}+r, giving H_2 = g_{s,s}-g_{s,e} = 1-r (Hashing bound). For unital noise, g_{s,e}=0, so H_2 = g_{s,s} = 2-log_d(1+(d^2-1)(1-γ)^2) for depolarizing. The transition at H_2=1-r separates error-correcting phase (I_c=k) from information-lost phase (I_c<k).
